titleStmt.title: SII 11.13: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 13. (B.K. No. 140 of 1926-27). GĀVARAVĀḌ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON THE BACK OF THE SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE NĀRĀYAṆADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is dated in Śaka, 791 [Virōdhi], Vaiśākha, śu. puṇṇame, lunar eclipse (= A.D. 869, April 29, Friday) and refers itself to the reign of Nṛipatuṅga Amōghavarsha I. It registers a gift of taxes on ghee made to the Mahājanas of Gāvaḍivāḍa when Dēvaṇṇayya was governing Beḷvola Three hundred. He is already known from the Nīlgund inscription to have been governing this district in A.D. 866 (Ep. Ind., Vol. VI., p. 98 ff.). Maṇi-Nāgōja engraved the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
erased
ra nṛpatuṅga nāmāṁkita paṭṭhagaṭṭhi
ttaraluttire sakanṛipakālātītāsaṁbatsara satāṅga ḷeḻunū
ṟatoṁbbhatta Ondane yaṁdu birōdhi yeṁba variṣaṁ pravarttisuttire Amō
ghavariṣadēvara pādapaṁkajabramara śiṣṭhajanaśraya sa
tyaśaucacāritra saṁpannanappa śrī dēvaṇnayyaṁ beḷvōla munuṟu
mansukhadināḷuttumiḻda śrīmaṁ baladēvanuṁ gōvaṇnayyanuṁ cannayya
tadiḻdu rājaśrāvitaṅgaḷ vaiśākhamāsa śuklapakṣa puṇnamedina
sōmagrahaṇa parvvado ḷgāvaḍivāḍada mahājana (a) AivadinbaThe letter da is engraved above the line.
kālaṁ kaḻci tuppada teṟeya candrasūryyavāre dānagoṭṭa Idharmma ma
dātaṅgi kōṭipaśumēthada phala Ida nāḻidāta vāraṇāśiyoḷsāsi
rvvarpārvaruṁ sāsirakavileyuṁ konda patakanakku © svasti śrī O
ru manneya maṇiya datti hiṭhusaṭe geṭṭoḍe Ainurbbarumiḻdu
garasiṁ gamaṇikharita narasiṅgha Amma
ḷa thuṅgāmarā biṭṭiga gōnātha nā guṭe pōta bamma
yatenaṅgaḷin māleyā suṭuvā baḍiga modalāgiḻdu dēvaṇna
leyavam modalāgiḻdu niṟisi yanā
ṟidu Udātaṁ vāraṇāsiyuma Aḻidonā lōkakke
bahubhirvvasudhairbhuktyā rājabhissagarādhibhiḥ yasya
yadā bhūmiḥ tasyatasya tadā phalam . svadhattaṁ para
yō harēti vasundarī ṣaṣṭi variṣasahasrāṇi vi
tē krimiḥ ©
svasti śrī maṇināgōjara likitaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
